ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education metric */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the education metric (e.g., Composite Rank, Overall Score) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the education metric */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the ranking belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education metric the ranking is for */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the ranking is for */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country for the specific education metric */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the country for the specific education metric */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the ranking data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the ranking entry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ranking data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES education_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "average_scores" (
  "average_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each average score entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the average score belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education metric the average score is for */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the period */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the period */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the country for the specific education metric over the period */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the average score data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the average score entry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the average score data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("average_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_average_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_average_scores_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES education_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., consultant, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education metric the data is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES education_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
